full: nD: 447F9e34-0 79-4co4-aaar-2c6121950895 TCGA-AR-AIAO-02A-PR a Breast, left, modified radical mastectomy: Multifocal lobular carcinoma with focal ductal features, Nottingham grade I (of III) forming two separate masses, 5.3 x 2.7 x 1.4 em and 1.2 x 1.0 x 1.0 cm in the inferior and medial breast respectively (AJC pT3). A biopsy cavity is identified adjacent to the tumor in the medial breast. Lymphovascular space invasion is not seen. The remaining breast parenchyma shows adenosis and duct ectasia. The nipple shows no diagnostic abnormalities. Margins of resection are negative for tumor (closest margin is anterior/inferior, free by at least 0.8 cm). Multiple (6 of 17) left axillary lymph nodes are involved by metastatic lobular carcinoma (AJC pN2). Focal extracapsular extension is also present.
